with chance.
the because
Where the AI evaluates itself, and this comes at the research stage.
So when it sort of generates, when we give it an outline, we give it the title, it asks questions that it needs to answer to create a research document that will be used to generate the article.
But then it actually evaluates whether that research document answered the questions, and it evaluates the quality of the research.
And then at the end of the article, when it generates the draft, it's going to use the writing guidelines.

And then it evaluates the article draft and sees, okay, did the AI actually follow the guidelines and the proofreading checklist?
